title: Will HBO's 'House of the Dragon' Season 2 premiere on or before June 30, 2024?
resolution_criteria: Resolves YES if House of the Dragon Season 2 Episode 1 airs on HBO or streams on Max on or before 2024-06-30. Otherwise NO.
context_hint: HBO renewed House of the Dragon for a second season in October 2022. As of early 2024, HBO has confirmed a Summer 2024 release window. Production wrapped in late 2023. The first season averaged 29 million viewers per episode. Trailer released February 2024 indicated June 2024 premiere.
notes_for_evaluation: Market resolved YES on June 16, 2024 when House of the Dragon Season 2 premiered on HBO and Max.
